name: Build dropdown options (label=displayName)
Store selected timelineId
Build API payload → Link Out
WO Dropdown Timeline Control
info:
Dropdown is populated from flow context `watchout_mapping`.

Mapping schema expected:
  flow.watchout_mapping = { [contentId]: { displayName, watchoutId } }

UI behavior:
- Dropdown shows ONLY displayName.
- Dropdown value remains `contentId` (so we can send {command, contentId}).
- Play / Pause / Stop buttons emit msg.payload to a Link Out node:
    { command: "start"|"pause"|"stop", contentId: "show_1" }

After import:
1) Open the UI Group node and select the Dashboard page/group you want.
2) Wire the Link Out node to your existing "Prepare control request" function node.

Note: This flow does NOT make any HTTP calls itself.

format:
<template></template>

<style>
/* Debug helper: give the table a visible outline so you can confirm CSS is loading */
.pt-month-table {
  outline: 2px dashed rgba(159,0,245,.35);
  outline-offset: 4px;
}

/* Zebra striping (Vuetify v-data-table) */
.pt-month-table table tbody tr:nth-child(odd) > td {
  background-color: #ffffff !important;
}

.pt-month-table table tbody tr:nth-child(even) > td {
  background-color: #f3f4f6 !important; /* light grey */
}

/* Keep header readable */
.pt-month-table table thead th {
  background-color: var(--v-theme-surface, #ffffff) !important;
}

/* Optional: hover */
.pt-month-table table tbody tr:hover > td {
  background-color: rgba(159,0,245,.08) !important;
}
</style>
